name: browser_tabs
description: List, create, close, or select a browser tab

index.description: Tab index. Required for "select". Optional for "close" (defaults to current tab).

position.description: Only set for action "new" when the user explicitly asks to reveal, show, focus, or open the browser visibly. Set to "active" for visible/revealed browser UI, or "side" if the user mentions "side", "beside", "side panel", or "side by side". Omit this parameter for background automation so focus is preserved.
